---
title: "Python Packages 6 : Documentation"
author: "nshephard"
date: "2022-11-30"
categories: [code, analysis, python, packages, packaging, git, github, gitlab]
image: https://live.staticflickr.com/65535/52294716597_ea3be238c0_k.jpg
---

This is the sixth in a series of posts on Python Packaging and covers writing and publishing documentation.

# Links

* [Sphinx](https://www.sphinx-doc.org/)

## Sphinx Extensions

* [numpydoc](https://numpydoc.readthedocs.io/)
* [sphinxcontrib-mermaid](https://github.com/mgaitan/sphinxcontrib-mermaid)
